raw: 617-367-2345 SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits up to 1 adult or 1 child for free. Visit www.bostonbyfoot.org to browse Boston By Foot's extensive public tour calendar. Passes are valid for all public walking tours; they are not valid for private tours, water-based tours, or annual celebration tours ( Beacon Hill with a BOO! & Footloose on the Freedom Trail ).
